title: Reading between the lines
setting: You invite an acquaintance to help you move on Saturday. Listen carefully to what he really means.

steps.speaker: Conocido
steps.es: ¿El sábado? Uy... fijate que ahí veo, maje.
steps.en: Saturday? Oof... well, I'll see, dude.

options.es: Tranquilo, si no podés no hay bronca.
options.en: No worries, if you can't, it's all good.
options.feedback: You read it right — 'ahí veo' is a soft no. Giving him an easy out is the gracious move.

options.es: ¡Genial, entonces contá conmigo que ahí estás!
options.en: Great, so count on it, you're in!
options.feedback: He was gently declining! Pushing past a soft no puts him in an awkward spot.

options.es: ¿Eso es un sí o un no?
options.en: Is that a yes or a no?
options.feedback: Direct — sometimes useful, but here it corners him. Reading the hint is smoother.

steps.speaker: Conocido
steps.es: Es que tengo un compromiso, creo. No estoy seguro.
steps.en: It's that I have a commitment, I think. I'm not sure.

options.es: No te preocupés, ya conseguiré quién me ayude.
options.en: Don't worry, I'll find someone to help.
options.feedback: Perfect — you let him off the hook without making him say no outright. Very culturally tuned.

options.es: Pero si no estás seguro, ¡entonces vení!
options.en: But if you're not sure, then come!
options.feedback: He's hedging on purpose to be polite. Don't trap him — that's the whole point of the hint.

options.en: Okay, let me know if you can.
options.feedback: Reasonable, though it gently keeps the pressure on. A clean release would be kinder.

steps.speaker: Conocido
steps.es: Sí, mejor así. Pero cualquier otra cosa, ahí estoy.
steps.en: Yeah, better that way. But anything else, I'm here.

options.es: Claro, maje. Para una birra siempre, ¿va?
options.en: Of course, dude. For a beer always, right?
options.feedback: You kept it warm and light — reading the room and keeping the friendship easy. Spot on.

options.es: Ya veo, solo no querías ayudar a mover.
options.en: I see, you just didn't want to help move.
options.feedback: Calling out the soft no embarrasses him. The unspoken deal is you both pretend. Let it be.
Polite and fine, though a warmer note would keep the bond stronger.

steps.speaker: Conocido
steps.es: ¡De show! Ahí nos pegamos una birra, pues.
steps.en: Cool! We'll grab a beer then.

options.es: Dale pues, maje. Ahí nos vemos.
options.en: Sounds good, dude. See you around.
options.feedback: Easy, friendly close — no hard feelings on either side. You handled the whole dance perfectly.

options.es: Eso, pero la birra la pagás vos por no ayudarme.
options.en: Yeah, but you're buying the beer for not helping.
options.feedback: Playful if your tone's right — but it does poke at the thing you'd both agreed to drop.
Relaxed and warm. A clean, friendly wrap-up.
